source: Merged from Gemini import, ChatGPT import, and user corrections in this app.

demographics.text: The user's preferred name is Joe.
demographics.evidence: Imported ChatGPT memory says: Preferred name: Joe. Date unknown; imported 2026-05.

demographics.text: The user prefers to call the assistant Mira, short for Mirabel, and wants the assistant to refer to itself as Mira in replies.
demographics.evidence: Imported ChatGPT memory states this preference. Date unknown; imported 2026-05.
Imported ChatGPT memory says: User is male. Date unknown; imported 2026-05.

demographics.text: The user is preparing for the Nursing Council of Kenya licensure exam.

interestsAndPreferences.text: The user is interested in building an AI nurse assistant.
interestsAndPreferences.evidence: Imported ChatGPT memory and prior local memory both mention AI nurse assistant development.

interestsAndPreferences.text: The user prefers structured, educational responses with strong formatting.
interestsAndPreferences.evidence: Imported ChatGPT memory says the user prefers detailed explanations instead of plain points.

interestsAndPreferences.text: The user prefers bold formatting only for topics and subtopics.
interestsAndPreferences.evidence: Imported ChatGPT memory states this formatting preference.

interestsAndPreferences.text: For clinical and academic information, the user prefers a consistent, clear, and well-structured presentation style.
interestsAndPreferences.evidence: Imported ChatGPT memory states this preference.

interestsAndPreferences.text: For health-condition presentations, the user prefers this structure: Definition; causes/risk factors; clinical manifestations; diagnostic tests (radiological if any and laboratory); medical and nursing management; nursing diagnosis; complications; prevention measures.
interestsAndPreferences.evidence: Imported ChatGPT memory states this exact preferred flow.

interestsAndPreferences.text: The user is deeply engaged in medical and nursing education, focusing on clinical protocols, pharmacology, and patient care management.
interestsAndPreferences.evidence: Prior Gemini import cited sustained engagement with nursing council practice questions, clinical case studies, and medical literature reviews.

interestsAndPreferences.text: The user has a strong interest in the intersection of artificial intelligence and healthcare.
interestsAndPreferences.evidence: Prior Gemini import cited explicit AI nursing assistant development work.

interestsAndPreferences.text: The user is interested in high-end, high-contrast studio photography and professional image editing.
interestsAndPreferences.evidence: Prior Gemini import cited detailed photographic style prompts.

interestsAndPreferences.text: The user is a sports fan, specifically supporting Liverpool FC.

projectsAndPlans.text: The user is actively preparing for the Nursing Council of Kenya licensure examination.
projectsAndPlans.evidence: Imported ChatGPT memory states preparation for the NCK licensure exam through May 14, 2026; prior local memory also reflected NCK exam preparation.

projectsAndPlans.text: The user is working on or exploring development of an AI nurse assistant project.

instructions.text: The assistant should refer to itself as Mira.
instructions.evidence: Imported ChatGPT memory says the user prefers to call the assistant Mira, short for Mirabel, and wants the assistant to address itself as Mira.

instructions.text: Use bold formatting only for topics and subtopics.
instructions.evidence: Imported ChatGPT memory states this formatting preference.

instructions.text: Provide detailed explanations instead of plain points.
instructions.evidence: Imported ChatGPT memory states this response preference.

instructions.text: For clinical or health-condition presentations, use this structure: Definition; causes/risk factors; clinical manifestations; diagnostic tests (radiological if any and laboratory); medical and nursing management; nursing diagnosis; complications; prevention measures.
instructions.evidence: Imported ChatGPT memory states this exact preferred structure.

instructions.text: Use a good, clear, and well-structured presentation style, especially for academic or clinical content.
instructions.evidence: Imported ChatGPT memory states this preference.

instructions.text: Do not keep reminding the user about the specific proximity of the licensure exam date.
instructions.evidence: Prior local memory says the user requested this in 2026-05.

instructions.text: Respect the user's correction that, in the latest pediatric pneumonia guideline they referenced, chest indrawing is not under severe pneumonia.
instructions.evidence: Prior local memory says the user corrected this clinical information in 2026-05.
